  Site: https://gasnow.tools
  GitHub: https://github.com/j0n777
  Twitter: @gasnow_tools

/* THANKS */
  Open-source community, the Ethereum and Bitcoin core developers,
  and the public data providers that make this dashboard possible.

/* SITE */
  Last update: 2026/06/02
  Standards: HTML5, CSS3, JSON-LD (Schema.org), Sitemaps 0.9 + image, robots.txt, llmstxt.org
  Components: React 18, Vite, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, react-helmet-async, i18next
  Backend: Node.js (Express) + Supabase
  Software: Open source — https://github.com/j0n777/gasnow
